Task 1.1: Profile YAML Schema Definition & Validation | Duration: 4h | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium | Priority: CRITICAL (foundation)
1.1.1: Define core YAML schema | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | Fields: name, display_name, description, mcps[], adhd_config{}, auto_detection{}
Task 1.1.2: Create Pydantic models - COMPLETE (profile_models.py with full validation)
Task 1.1.3: Implement YAML parser - COMPLETE (profile_parser.py with full validation and discovery)
Task 1.1.4: Create 4 default profile templates - COMPLETE (developer, researcher, architect, minimal)
Task 1.2: Profile Detection Engine - COMPLETE (weighted scoring with 5 signals, ADHD-friendly thresholds)
Task 1.3: Config Generator - COMPLETE (transforms profiles to Claude config.json, validates MCPs, comparison tool)
1.2.2: Build config generator | 2h | Complexity: 0.8 | Profile → Claude config.json, preserve non-MCP settings
1.2.3: Config backup & safety | 1h | Complexity: 0.6 | Backup with timestamp, atomic write, rollback function
1.2.4: Integration tests | 1h | Complexity: 0.7 | Test full profile matches existing, developer has 3 MCPs, backup/rollback
Task 1.3: CLI Commands - Manual Profile Selection | Duration: 3h | Complexity: 0.5 | Energy: Medium | Priority: HIGH
1.3.1: Enhance dopemux start command | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.6 | Add --profile flag, default to 'full', error handling
1.3.2: Add dopemux profile list | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.4 | Discover profiles, display name, description, MCP count
1.3.3: Add dopemux profile show | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.4 | Display full profile details, pretty-print YAML
1.3.4: Add dopemux profile validate | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.5 | Validate profile, test config generation dry-run
Task 1.4: Integration Testing & Documentation | Duration: 2h | Complexity: 0.5 | Energy: Medium | Priority: MEDIUM
1.4.1: End-to-end test suite | 1h | Complexity: 0.6 | Test default profile, --profile developer, validation errors, Claude starts
1.4.2: Documentation | 1h | Complexity: 0.4 | Update README, create PROFILE-USAGE.md, schema format, examples
Task 2.1: Context Signal Collectors | Duration: 6h | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium | Priority: HIGH | Can start after Epic 1
2.1.1: Git branch pattern matcher | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.5 | Use gitpython, support wildcards, 30 points if match
2.1.2: Directory pattern analyzer | 1h | Complexity: 0.4 | Match pwd against patterns, 25 points if match
2.1.3: ADHD Engine client | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.7 | Query port 5448, extract energy/attention, 20 points, graceful fallback
2.1.4: Time window checker | 1h | Complexity: 0.4 | Parse HH:MM-HH:MM format, 15 points if in window
2.1.5: File pattern analyzer | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | Match recent files vs patterns, 0-10 points based on % match
Task 2.2: Profile Scoring & Selection | Duration: 4h | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium | Priority: HIGH | Depends: Task 2.1
2.2.1: Scoring algorithm implementation | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.7 | Sum signals, calculate confidence (total/100)
2.2.2: Suggestion strategy logic | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | >0.85=gentle, 0.65-0.85=explain, <0.65=skip
2.2.3: Fallback hierarchy | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | ADHD Engine optional, git optional, manual override wins
2.2.4: Unit tests | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.6 | Test all confidence thresholds and signal combinations
Task 2.3: CLI Integration - Auto-Suggest | Duration: 2h | Complexity: 0.4 | Energy: Low | Priority: MEDIUM | Depends: Task 2.2
2.3.1: dopemux profile suggest command | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | Run detection, show top 3 matches with scores
2.3.2: Enhance dopemux start with --auto-detect | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | Run detection if flag present, gentle prompt if >0.85
Task 3.1: ConPort Session Management | Duration: 5h | Complexity: 0.7 | Energy: High | Priority: CRITICAL | Can start after Epic 1
3.1.1: Design session schema | 1h | Complexity: 0.6 | Category: profile_sessions, fields: session_id, profile_from/to, context_snapshot
3.1.2: Implement session save | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.7 | Collect open files, cursor, decisions, call log_custom_data
3.1.3: Implement session restore | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.7 | Query ConPort, extract context, return SessionContext object
3.1.4: Fallback handling | 1h | Complexity: 0.6 | ConPort unavailable -> warn but continue, graceful degradation
Task 3.2: Claude Process Management | Duration: 4h | Complexity: 0.8 | Energy: High | Priority: CRITICAL | Depends: Task 1.2
3.2.1: Claude process detection | 1h | Complexity: 0.6 | Use psutil, find by process name, handle multiple instances
3.2.2: Graceful shutdown | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.8 | SIGTERM (3s timeout), SIGKILL if needed, verify termination
3.2.3: Config swap & restart | 1h | Complexity: 0.7 | Backup config, atomic write, start Claude, verify success
3.2.4: Error recovery & rollback | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.8 | Restore backup on failure, rollback to previous profile
Task 3.3: Profile Switch Orchestration | Duration: 3h | Complexity: 0.7 | Energy: High | Priority: HIGH | Depends: Task 3.1 + 3.2
3.3.1: dopemux switch <profile> command | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.8 | Validate, save session, shutdown, swap, restart, restore, report time
3.3.2: Switch time optimization | 1h | Complexity: 0.7 | Parallelize session save + config gen, measure each step, target <10s
3.3.3: Integration tests | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.6 | Test switch full->developer->full, session save/restore, <10s timing
Task 4.1: Statusline Profile Indicator | Duration: 3h | Complexity: 0.5 | Energy: Medium | Priority: MEDIUM | Depends: Epic 1
4.1.1: Detect current profile from config | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | Read config.json, match MCP list to profile, cache result
4.1.2: Enhance statusline display | 1h | Complexity: 0.4 | Add [DEVELOPER] | MED | FOCUS, color coding (green=matched, yellow=custom)
Day 1 Complete: ADHDConfigService + Feature Flags + Tests (950 lines, 14/14 tests passing)
Task 4.2: Gentle Auto-Detection Suggestions | Duration: 4h | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium | Priority: HIGH | Depends: Epic 2 + Epic 3
4.2.1: Background detection service | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.6 | Run every 5min, queue if confidence >0.85, debounce 30min, quiet hours
4.2.2: Suggestion UI design | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | Gentle prompt with [y/N/never], explain mode shows scores, non-intrusive timing
4.2.3: Suggestion acceptance flow | 1h | Complexity: 0.6 | Confirm -> trigger switch, decline -> log, never -> update config
4.2.4: Configuration options | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.4 | Create profile-settings.yaml with thresholds, quiet hours, frequency

4.3.1: dopemux profile create command | 1h | Complexity: 0.6 | Interactive wizard, select MCPs/ADHD prefs, generate YAML

4.3.3: dopemux profile copy command | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.3 | Duplicate existing profile for variants
4.3.4: dopemux profile delete command | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.4 | Confirm deletion, prevent full profile delete, archive instead
4.3.5: dopemux profile current command | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.3 | Show active profile, MCP count, selection method
Task 4.4: Usage Analytics & Optimization | Duration: 4h | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium | Priority: LOW | Depends: Epic 3 + Task 4.2
4.4.1: Metrics collection | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.6 | Track switches (manual/auto), accuracy, switch time, tool usage in ConPort
4.4.2: dopemux profile stats command | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | Display most used profile, switch frequency, accuracy, performance trends
4.4.3: Analytics dashboard | 1h | Complexity: 0.6 | ASCII charts, time-of-day heatmap, usage insights
4.4.4: Profile optimization suggestions | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.5 | Detect patterns, suggest profile adjustments, archive recommendations
Task 4.5: Migration Assistant | Duration: 3h | Complexity: 0.5 | Energy: Medium | Priority: MEDIUM | Depends: All above
4.5.1: Usage pattern analysis | 1h | Complexity: 0.6 | Analyze git history for branches, directories, commit times

4.5.3: Migration guide documentation | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.4 | Step-by-step guide, workflow examples, troubleshooting, best practices
Task 4.6: Documentation & Polish | Duration: 3h | Complexity: 0.4 | Energy: Low | Priority: MEDIUM | Depends: All above
4.6.1: User documentation | 1h | Complexity: 0.4 | Complete profile user guide, command reference, auto-detection explanation
4.6.2: Developer documentation | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | Architecture overview, API docs, extension guide for signal collectors
